# GitHub About — Copy into repo settings

Go to **Repository → click the ⚙️ next to "About"** and paste the following.

---

## Description (≤350 characters)

**Short (recommended):**
```
AI agent for security teams: automate assessment of documents, questionnaires & reports. Multi-format parsing, RAG knowledge base, OpenAI/Ollama. Risks, compliance gaps, remediations. MIT.
```

**Alternative (with more keywords):**
```
Automated security assessment agent: parse PDF/Word/Excel/PPT, query policy KB (RAG), output structured reports (risks, compliance gaps, remediations). Supports OpenAI, Claude, Ollama. For enterprise security teams. MIT.
```

---

## Topics (tags)

Add these in the About section → Topics:

```
security
ai-agent
llm
rag
compliance
security-assessment
fastapi
python
openai
ollama
document-parsing
```

Pick 5–10 that fit (GitHub allows up to 20 topics).

---

## Website (optional)

Leave blank, or add your project/docs URL if you have one.
